note: World's tallest building; entrance smooth, fast elevators to fully accessible observation decks (124/125/148) including the open-air terrace. Entered via the accessible Dubai Mall. A flawless accessible highlight.
World's largest mall; free loaner wheelchairs, elevators/ramps connecting all levels, wide corridors, houses the accessible Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Air-conditioned, ideal with family.

Spectacular fountain show on Burj Lake; the surrounding promenade is flat, wide and smooth with no gradients, plus a wheelchair-accessible Boardwalk that gets you within 9m. Free, multiple accessible vantage points.
The iconic palm island; Atlantis The Palm resort, aquariums and attractions are accessible with adapted rooms and paths. A big family destination. Palm Tower/monorail accessible.

Modern take on an Arabian souk near Burj Al Arab; sidewalk ramp + large elevator for step-free entry, flat smooth indoor hallways, waterfront restaurants accessible. A few individual shops have a small step.

place: Al Fahidi Historical Neighbourhood & Dubai Museum
note: Restored old-Dubai quarter with wind towers; largely accessible lanes and ramps in the fort, but the museum's main exhibits are down a fairly steep spiral walkway (power chairs manage, manual needs assistance).

Dune-bashing + Bedouin camp; the SAND is very hard for wheels, but some camps (e.g. Oasis Palm) have concrete paths making the camp accessible. Book an accessible-camp operator; restrooms may have a small step. Dune driving itself needs transfer.
Modern waterfront district with a flat accessible promenade, dining and yacht/dhow cruises (accessible boats available). Pleasant, level strolling.

Atmospheric traditional markets across Dubai Creek; the historic area has poor access - narrow, many shops have steps, patchy curb cuts. The Metro entrance nearby is accessible; an abra creek crossing is not.
Popular beach with a long accessibility ramp to the water, firm mat pathways over the sand and beach wheelchairs available. One of Dubai's more inclusive beach options for families.
